## Robot Mercenaries

#### 0-1 Ambot (Cost: 5 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Ambot | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | \-1 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Ambot is equipped with light armour plating, two Tunneling Claws, and a Melta Gun. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Tunneling Claw.** Melee, HEAVY, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, RISKY  
* **Melta Gun.** 12”, \+1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, RISKY

When you recruit the Ambot, you can choose to replace its Melta Gun with a Grav Gun and a Mono-Hook. If you recruit two Ambots, you must choose this option for exactly one of them.

* **Grav Gun.** 24”, \-1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, STUN  
* **Mono-Hook.** 6”, SHRAPNEL. This weapon causes no Injury roll, but still causes a BLOOD MARKER from its SHRAPNEL Keyword. If the wielder hits a target with this weapon that is not LARGE, the model hit is moved in a straight line directly towards the Ambot until it is as close as possible.

**Abilities**

* **Cranial Governors.** At the start of the Ambot’s Activation, you can choose to disable its Safe Mode. Once disabled, it remains disabled until the end of the battle. While Safe Mode is disabled, the Ambot gains the following bonuses and penalties:  
  * \+1 DICE to Hit and \+1 INJURY DICE with all melee attacks.  
  * Rolls 2D6 instead of 1D6 when Charging, taking the highest result.  
  * Cannot make ranged attacks.  
  * Must split melee attacks as evenly as possible, as chosen by you, between each model within 1” of it, enemy or ally.  
  * Must Charge the nearest model it can see, enemy or ally, as its first Action during each Activation, if there is any other model within 12” that it can see.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, DEEP STRIKE (TUNNEL), LARGE, NEGATE GAS, NEGATE SHRAPNEL, NO PROMOTION, STRONG, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Hacked Cyber Mastiff (Cost: 2 Glory)

A Necromunda Gang (House Orlock) Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Cyber Mastiff | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Hacked Cyber Mastiff is equipped with its Savage Bite. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Savage Bite.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, RISKY

**Abilities**

* **Cyber Swiftness.** The Hacked Cyber Mastiff has \+1 DICE to all Dash and Jump Success Rolls  
* **Pet.** Select one other non-ARTIFICIAL, non-BEAST model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Hacked Cyber Mastiff forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.  
* **Tanacity.** When the Hacked Cyber Mastiff is taken Out of Action, before removing it from the table, it can make a single melee attack against an enemy it is in close combat with. BLOOD MARKERS cannot be spent on this attack's Success Roll.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-1 Iron Automata (Cost: 5 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Iron Automata | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Iron Automata is equipped with armour plating, an Autocannon, and a Heavy Power Fist. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Autocannon.** 36”, AUTOMATIC 2, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED  
* **Heavy Power Fist.** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY, ARMOUR PIERCING 2

**Abilities**

* **Automated Repairs.** The Iron Automata is only a casualty on a result of 1\.  
* **Really Glitchy.** All Success Rolls the Iron Automata takes are Risky.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, LARGE, NEGATE GAS, NEGATE SHRAPNEL, NO PROMOTION, TOUGH
